description: DRS（可调尾翼减阻系统）效果参数，用于分析DRS对超车和圈时的影响。2026规则下主动空气动力学引入了额外复杂度。

typical_speed_gain_by_zone.description: DRS打开后的典型速度增益，取决于直道长度和基础下压力水平

Saudi Arabia.primary_overtake: T1 but narrow entry, wall proximity limits moves

Melbourne.primary_overtake: T3 and T11 after DRS straights

Suzuka.primary_overtake: T1 after main straight, but DRS zones short

Miami.primary_overtake: T1 and T17 after DRS zones

Monaco.primary_overtake: Sainte Devote only under special circumstances

Montreal.primary_overtake: T1 hairpin after DRS, T13 wall of champions

Spielberg.primary_overtake: T3 and T4 after DRS zones, multiple lines possible

Hungaroring.primary_overtake: T1 but very difficult, relies on strategy

Spa.primary_overtake: T1 after Kemmel DRS, T5 Les Combes

Zandvoort.primary_overtake: T1 but narrow, banked corners limit DRS benefit

Monza.primary_overtake: T1 Variante del Rettifilo, slipstream + DRS combined

Baku.primary_overtake: T1 after 2.2km straight, largest DRS effect on calendar

Singapore.primary_overtake: T7 and T1 but very tight, mostly strategy-based

Austin.primary_overtake: T1 and T12 after DRS zones

Mexico City.primary_overtake: T1 after main straight DRS, altitude reduces DRS effect

Interlagos.primary_overtake: T1 Senna S after DRS, Subida dos Boxes hill

Las Vegas.primary_overtake: T1 and T14 after long DRS straights

Lusail.primary_overtake: T1 after DRS but high downforce limits speed delta

Yas Marina.primary_overtake: T8 after back straight DRS, T1 after main straight

slipstream_interaction.description: DRS与slipstream的叠加效应，两者可同时生效
slipstream_interaction.too_close_penalty: <0.3s前车脏空气影响转弯，直线slipstream强但弯角失速

2026_active_aero_drs_interaction.description: 2026规则下主动空气动力学与DRS的交互影响
2026_active_aero_drs_interaction.z_mode_default: 弯中高下压力模式(Z-mode)，直线上可切换低阻力模式
2026_active_aero_drs_interaction.drs_enhanced_effect: DRS开启时与主动低阻力模式叠加，直道速度增益可能比2025更显著(约+10-15%额外增益)
2026_active_aero_drs_interaction.corner_exit_transition: 关闭DRS+切回高下压力模式需1-2秒过渡，此期间刹车距离需额外5-10m
2026_active_aero_drs_interaction.analysis_implication: 2026数据中DRS效果不能直接与2025对比，需考虑主动空力的额外影响
2026_active_aero_drs_interaction.dirty_air_changes: 2026尾流效应减弱(设计目标减少50%)，跟车距离可缩短0.5-1.0s，DRS辅助超车更可行

analysis_warnings.drs_in_vsc: VSC期间DRS不可用，圈时数据中DRS直道的速度会骤降，不可用于正常对比
analysis_warnings.drs_gap_threshold: 只有与前车间距<1.0s时DRS才可用，领先车手无DRS，直接对比圈时需注意DRS状态差异
analysis_warnings.practice_drs: 练习赛中DRS使用限制更少，圈时数据可能包含DRS辅助但不反映比赛条件
analysis_warnings.drs_detection_line: DRS激活取决于检测线位置而非直觉上的'最近前车'，有时会导致意外激活/未激活
